codeReview.summary: The feature contract is satisfied: live token pricing now recomputes optional aggregate fields from live-patched pool data when DeFiLlama pricing succeeds, falls back to seeded aggregates when live pricing fails, and includes focused coverage proving the live aggregate-field path.

summary: Reviewed mission metadata, handoff, transcript skeleton, skill guidance, commit diff, and the current HEAD implementation/tests. The change correctly sources optional onchain simple token price aggregate fields from live provider-backed pool aggregates on successful live pricing, preserves seeded fallback when live pricing is unavailable, and adds explicit regression coverage for the live aggregate-field behavior.
